response.title: Senior Corporate Attorney
response.description: Greenfield Legal Associates is seeking a highly skilled Senior Corporate Attorney to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in corporate law, mergers and acquisitions, and compliance. This role will involve providing legal advice to our clients, drafting and negotiating contracts, and ensuring compliance with applicable laws and regulations. You will work closely with clients and internal teams to facilitate business transactions and protect the interests of the firm and its clients.

required_skills: Extensive experience in corporate law, particularly in mergers and acquisitions (5+ years)
Strong expertise in contract negotiation and drafting
In-depth knowledge of corporate governance and compliance matters
Familiarity with securities regulations and corporate finance
Ability to conduct legal research and analysis on complex corporate matters
Proven track record of managing multiple transactions simultaneously
Strong communication and interpersonal skills for client interactions
preferred_skills: Experience with international transactions and cross-border issues
Familiarity with intellectual property law as it relates to corporate transactions
Ability to mentor junior attorneys and paralegals
Experience in a law firm or corporate legal department setting
Membership in relevant professional organizations such as the American Bar Association
requirements.education: Juris Doctor (JD) from an accredited law school
